contracts.label: Execution Run Record
contracts.purpose: parent/child execution lineage across supervisor, worker, and judge lanes

contracts.label: Scheduled Job Record
contracts.purpose: recurring cadence, last outcome, next run, and current state

contracts.label: Operator Stream Event
contracts.purpose: single event language for alerts, runs, escalations, and operator-visible state changes

contracts.label: Quota Lease Summary
contracts.purpose: provider posture, reserves, throttles, and recent outcomes

contracts.label: Command Decision Record
contracts.purpose: captures who decided, why, and under what policy class

contracts.label: Plan Packet
contracts.purpose: normalized supervisor-to-worker handoff for managed execution

contracts.label: Promotion Packet
contracts.purpose: normalized build-system-to-adopted-system handoff from devstack into Athanor canonical truth

contracts.label: Readiness Ledger
contracts.purpose: cross-system implementation-readiness answer spanning devstack proof, Athanor adoption state, proof posture, approval state, and blockers

contracts.label: Wave Admissibility Record
contracts.purpose: policy-backed decision record for whether a packet or implementation wave may execute automatically

contracts.label: Eval Run Ledger
contracts.purpose: machine-readable benchmark, champion-challenger, and promotion-validity evidence for major initiatives and lane champions

contracts.label: Artifact Provenance Record
contracts.purpose: links outputs to runs, prompts, policies, lanes, and judges

contracts.label: Economic Dispatch Ledger
contracts.purpose: lane-to-provider reserve allocation, ROI posture, and local-vs-cloud opportunity-cost guidance

contracts.label: Capacity Envelope
contracts.purpose: per-node and per-GPU admissibility, reserve, preemption, and utilization-target truth

contracts.label: Restore Ledger
contracts.purpose: per-store restore evidence, drill freshness, recovery order, and confidence

contracts.label: Governance Confidence Record
contracts.purpose: compiled drill freshness and blocker posture for implementation admissibility

contracts.label: Recommendation Record
contracts.purpose: evidence-backed next-wave, lane-selection, capacity-use, and freshness-priority recommendations

contracts.label: Lane Selection Matrix
contracts.purpose: lexicographic routing precedence, execution-mode defaults, tie-breakers, and task-class lane preferences

contracts.label: Approval Matrix
contracts.purpose: canonical approval classes, degraded-mode overrides, and allowed action sets

contracts.label: Failure Routing Matrix
contracts.purpose: allowed fallbacks, blocked workloads, alert thresholds, and recovery gates per failure class

contracts.label: Artifact Topology Registry
contracts.purpose: canonical homes, staging surfaces, retention classes, and restore sources for runtime and proving artifacts

contracts.label: Capacity Telemetry Contract
contracts.purpose: sample cadence, source surfaces, saturation thresholds, and protected-reserve telemetry rules

contracts.label: Vendor Policy Registry
contracts.purpose: machine-readable allowed-use posture, hosted-indexing limits, and sensitivity restrictions per provider family

contracts.label: Migration Map
contracts.purpose: current-state to target-state handoff plan, lane transfers, and retirement gates

contracts.label: Sidecar Retention Policy
contracts.purpose: bounded keep, demote, and remove rules for sidecars and retiring lanes so optional tooling cannot silently become the system

contracts.label: Quota Truth Ledger
contracts.purpose: observed quota headroom, reset windows, spend ceilings, reserve floors, and confidence for subscription, metered, and local-compute families

contracts.label: Planned Subscription Evidence Record
contracts.purpose: activation-readiness and supported-tool usage evidence for planned subscription families before they enter live routing

contracts.label: Capacity Telemetry Snapshot
contracts.purpose: current node, GPU, queue, idle-window, and harvest-admission observations

contracts.label: Active Override Record
contracts.purpose: time-bounded Shaun-only override state with TTL, audit references, and expiry handling

contracts.label: Routing Proof Record
contracts.purpose: full-stack acceptance harness output proving routing, failure, approval, scope, and override behavior

contracts.label: Pilot Eval Evidence Record
contracts.purpose: machine-readable evidence linking bounded pilot eval ids to executed operator-test flows, command readiness, and optional judged comparison packs

contracts.label: Governed Dispatch State
contracts.purpose: durable claim and runtime posture for the current ranked autonomous dispatch item, on-deck follow-through, and work-economy readiness without fabricating safe-surface executor activity
